title: randia abnormis
intro: Randia abnormis, also known as the abnormal randia or randia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Randia abnormis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable remedy in folk medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
